text.tspan: mlflow run id / name / experiment id / uri
dedicated _eval_env (separate from training env; warns if reusing training env)
eval_fraction overrides fixed eval_steps when set
rank feature importance by reward drop
actor in deterministic / MODE interaction type
closes over price / volume series — no env coupling
BenchmarkEngine resolves price column + volume source from market_data
Built specs: Buy-and-hold · Short-and-hold · TWAP · VWAP
measure drop in cumulative reward vs baseline
output: ranked feature importance bar chart
ActorCaptumProxy wraps TorchRL actor for Captum
Build proxy targets per horizon h ∈ [10, 50, 200]
IC scoring — per feature × per horizon
feat_ranked = rolling rank of feature values
tgt_ranked = rolling rank of target values
val_mean_ic = mean IC on val data
keep stats for horizon with highest |ICIR|
Group 18 training parquet files by symbol
6 symbol groups (AAPL · AMZN · AVGO · META · MSFT · TSLA)
concat raw DataFrames for its 3 training days
session boundary reset at gaps > 1 hour
Transform 6 val files (one per symbol, day 2026-03-02)
val_j = merged[:mid] → saved to tmp parquet
test_j = merged[mid:] → saved to tmp parquet
(pooled configs use 50k each to keep eval fast)
actual training lives in the 18 memmaps)
18 memmap files (one per training day-symbol pair)
compute normalisation stats on train ONLY
write float32 binary array to disk
Pick next file from shuffled deck of 18 memmaps
(6 symbols × 3 training days; deck reshuffled each cycle)
Build fresh inner tradingenv.TradingEnv on each reset
R_t = log return of portfolio value (NLV path, includes fees)
clip_rewards = True: clamp D_t to [−10, 10] (prevents gradient explosion)
Reset A_t, B_t, prev_nlv to zero at each episode start
TD3 / DDPG: init_rand_steps = 5000 fully random warmup
(RandomPolicy used until buffer has enough data)
y = r + γ · min(Q1_tgt(s',ã), Q2_tgt(s',ã)) γ=0.995
Soft target update (every actor update step):
y = r + γ · Q_target(s', actor_target(s')) γ=0.995
Actor loss (every step — no policy delay):
Note: no target policy smoothing (noise_clip is TD3-only)
Critic (state value V(s), no action input):
